rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS KOCH VS. AMIR MOGANNAM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaitniff Nicholas Kochs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories To Defendant Amir Mogannam, Set One; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney Of Record Jose Montalvo In The Amount Of $1,873.05
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 3, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFFs NICHOLAS KOCH, NIHAL OZTEK, JESSE RHODES, and SHOSHANA WALTER's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories To Defendant Amir Mogannam, Set One; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney Of Record Jose Montalvo In The Amount Of $1,873.05 Granted in part and Denied in part. Motion as to Form Interrogatory 2.12 is DENIED as moot, withdrawn. Motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory 15.1 for Defendant to serve within 10 days of notice of entry of order further responses which provide facts known to the defendant as to each denial and affirmative defense as of the date further responses are served, if responses have not yet been served. Request for Sanctions is DENIED.= (501/REQ)
